title: Vivi Pushes Toward Yuba
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on vivi pushes toward yuba, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Vivi Pushes Toward Yuba. The crew reaches Yuba and sees what the drought and rebellion have done to the people who still believe in Alabasta. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: stoodop,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: JOOKING AROUND!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: How long is he planning on making us wait!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The least he could do is give us an octofait in the mean- while!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Well, I'm just going to stand here and spin! Spin, spin, spin like a beautiful swan!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: Mr. 2, could you please just wait quietly?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: That'sright! Allyer'yappin's makin'myhips achetchell!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Merry Christmas
dialogue.text: That goes for you too, Ms. Miss Merry Christmas.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Fufufu... I suppose asking you to all get along is impossible.

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: Miss Miss All Sunday,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Then again, There's no need for that either...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Oh heellooo the're, Sunday! How ya doin '!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Didn't tell youtube downloadiot?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Thank you all for taking the long trip out here for this meeting.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: It's quite a sight seeing you agents all gathered in one place.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Where exactly are we,

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: Miss Miss All Sunday...?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Oh that's right. You don't know because Banchi brought you here using the back door...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I'm sure you've all heard of it before though. The city where travellers come to gamble in hopes of getting rich...

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: I welcome you officer agents to Rainbase, the city of dreams...

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: And the building you're in right now,

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: Is sitting right in the middle of the Rainbow oasis.

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: Rain Dimmers,

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Casino "Rain Dinners"

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: The largest casino in Rainbow...!

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: If you have no further questions, then let's get the meeting underway.

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: Finebyme!

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: Startthedamm meetings! Start!BeginlGo!

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: But of course, there's someone I must introduce to you before that...

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: The boss whom you've known nothing about except his codename...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Until now, I've been acting on his behalf to keep his identity a secret,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But there's no longer a need for that... You under- stand why, don't you...?

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: The end is near, that's why...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What!?

summary: This part develops vivi pushes toward yuba and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
